title: Growth of Hydroxyapatite Huge Single Crystals by Hydrothermal decomposition of PolyPhosphate
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"k4dtl","text":"Using Polyphosphate, Calcium mixture and water, causes pure single apatite crystal by hydrothermal synthesis.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Put Orthophosphate into the chemical resistant Beaker, e.x PTFE, keep it 210degrees Celsius at least 2 weeks.

PTFE High pressure reactor vessel, 25ml volume, put 0.5g of upper polyphosphate. add 0.6-0.7g Calcium oxide then mix them. add 12-14ml water, Tighten the vessel and put into electro Furness 200-240C. Keep it for 5-7days. You can find mm size Hydroxyapatite crystals.
2 weeks or more for prepare polyphosphate. 1 week for Hydroxyapatite synthetization.
See figure in Figures section. See figure in Figures section. See figure in Figures section.
Figure 1. Macro Picture Figure 2. Diameter microscope Figure 3. SEM View Figure 4. TEM image Chose thin crystal due to crystal analysis
